steps.clue: Upgrade the required bows and build the Ragnarok DG-4.
Shoot the four sparking objects before the teleporter resets.
Travel to the past and collect the canister, fuses, and safe code.
Open the safe, install the fuses and coils, then complete both memory games.
Press the green button, shoot the fallen capsule, and collect the Golden Rod.
Repeat the wisp sequence, return to the past, and collect the stone tablet.
Complete the Keeper's four soul rituals and teleport the MPD.
Defeat the Keeper, then use the Summoning Key to destroy the Moon.
